infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DIY Helper needs camera access to capture photos and videos of your home repair projects.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DIY Helper needs microphone access for voice descriptions and hands-free workshop mode.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DIY Helper needs photo library access to save and share project photos.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: DIY Helper uses speech recognition for voice commands in workshop mode.
